summary: Add ORM configuration, MVP data models, Prisma client, and seed data for sample radar tasks.
acceptance_criteria: Prisma is configured for local SQLite development while keeping the schema straightforward to migrate to PostgreSQL later.
The MVP models exist for RadarTask, SearchRun, KeywordCandidate, SerpResult, Opportunity, and MvpSpec.
The schema preserves optional future user ownership without requiring a full users table in the MVP.
A Prisma client helper exists at lib/db.ts and avoids creating excessive clients during development.
A seed script imports or mirrors the sample radar task data from mock-data/sample_radar_tasks.json without modifying mock-data.
README documents the database setup, migration, generate, and seed commands.
No admin auth, UI CRUD, SERP provider, LLM, or scan orchestration is implemented in this task.
notes: Prefer Prisma because the existing M1 plan explicitly names Prisma or Drizzle and the project already uses npm.
Do not run destructive database commands. It is acceptable to add migration scripts, but avoid deleting local data.
non_goals: No Radar Task UI or CRUD routes.
No real SERP or LLM provider integration.
No paid service, deployment, or external database setup.
